brand_identity.name: RiDATOUR
brand_identity.aesthetic: Clean SaaS (Stripe/Linear inspired) with Royal Accents
brand_identity.logo_concept: Purple background, White/Gold text, Airplane motif (Use Lucide 'Plane' icon if SVG unavailable)

primary.description: Violet 700 - Used for primary actions, active states, and brand identity.

secondary.description: Slate 50/100 - Used for backgrounds, subtle buttons.

accent.description: Amber 600 - Used for status badges, premium tags, and highlights.

layout_strategy.structure: Sidebar Navigation (Left) + Sticky Header (Top) + Scrollable Content Area

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-slate-100 text-slate-600 hover:text-slate-900 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg transition-colors
buttons.destructive: bg-rose-600 text-white hover:bg-rose-700 h-10 px-4 py-2 rounded-lg shadow-sm transition-all

cards.base: rounded-xl border border-slate-100 bg-white text-slate-950 shadow-sm
cards.stats: p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-200

inputs.base: flex h-10 w-full rounded-md border border-slate-200 bg-white px-3 py-2 text-sm ring-offset-white file:border-0 file:bg-transparent file:text-sm file:font-medium placeholder:text-slate-500 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-primary focus-visible:ring-offset-2 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:opacity-50

badges.base: inline-flex items-center rounded-full border px-2.5 py-0.5 text-xs font-semibold transition-colors focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-ring focus:ring-offset-2

images.description: Modern airport terminal at dusk - Professional, Global, Efficient. Use for Login Page Right Panel.
Kaaba at Night with Gold trim - Spiritual, Premium. Use for Hajj/Umrah package headers.

universal_guidelines: ALL interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='submit-login').
Do not use native HTML <select> or <input type='date'>. Use Shadcn Select and Calendar/Popover.
Ensure 200% spacing in layouts compared to standard Bootstrap sites. Space is luxury.
Never use pure black (#000000). Use Slate-900 or Violet-950.
Tables should have sticky headers for long lists.
Forms must be broken into logical sections with clear headings.
Support Bilingual UI (EN/ID) - Prepare strings for i18n wrapping.
instructions_to_main_agent: 2. Setup the Layout wrapper with Sidebar and Navbar immediately.
3. Implement the Dashboard view first to establish the visual language.
4. Use the defined color palette in tailwind.config.js before building components.
5. For the Logo, create a component 'Logo.js' that uses the Plane icon and text, styled with the Brand colors.
